proof_boundary: This contract defines hosted deployment proof. It is not proof that a hosted environment exists.

required_evidence_categories.label: Hosted URL or named environment
required_evidence_categories.why: A localhost or local Docker run is not hosted private-beta proof.

required_evidence_categories.label: Build or commit reference
required_evidence_categories.why: Reviewers need to know exactly what code and artifact were deployed.

required_evidence_categories.label: TLS, HTTPS, and secure cookie proof
required_evidence_categories.why: Hosted sessions must be protected in transit and by session cookie settings.

required_evidence_categories.label: Managed auth and session configuration
required_evidence_categories.why: Real users need account/session controls beyond local seeded sessions.

required_evidence_categories.label: Secrets manager and key rotation
required_evidence_categories.why: Hosted API, AI, storage, and payment keys must not live in local files or logs.

required_evidence_categories.label: Private database and object storage
required_evidence_categories.why: Real trade files and packet data need private managed persistence, not local filesystem proof.

required_evidence_categories.label: Upload scanning, quarantine, and file-safety controls
required_evidence_categories.why: Real uploads stay closed until hosted malware scanning, type checks, and quarantine are proven.

required_evidence_categories.label: Rate-limit and abuse controls
required_evidence_categories.why: Public routes and upload/API paths need hosted abuse controls and evidence.

required_evidence_categories.label: Hosted smoke-test result
required_evidence_categories.why: The exact environment must pass core app flows, not just local tests.

required_evidence_categories.label: Monitoring, logs, and alert ownership
required_evidence_categories.why: Private beta needs visibility into errors, uploads, auth, AI, jobs, and incidents.

required_evidence_categories.label: Backup, restore, or rollback proof
required_evidence_categories.why: Operators must prove recovery from bad deploys or data loss before real users.

required_evidence_categories.label: Incident and support owner
required_evidence_categories.why: A real beta needs named support and incident-response ownership.

required_evidence_categories.label: Privacy and data-handling scope
required_evidence_categories.why: Hosted beta must document whether real files, AI, retention, deletion, and vendors are in scope.

source_anchors.name: Baseline cyber security controls for small and medium organizations
source_anchors.product_use: Baseline hosted operations, backups, patching, monitoring, and incident-readiness reference.

source_anchors.name: Transport Layer Security Cheat Sheet
source_anchors.product_use: TLS/HTTPS and transport protection evidence anchor.

source_anchors.name: Secrets Management Cheat Sheet
source_anchors.product_use: Hosted secrets, tokens, and key-control evidence anchor.

source_anchors.name: Logging Cheat Sheet
source_anchors.product_use: Security logging and operational monitoring evidence anchor.

source_anchors.name: Secure by Design
source_anchors.product_use: Secure-by-design/default launch posture and product owner accountability anchor.
